requirement_topic.en: UTE Grid Connection — 230 V / 400 V, 50 Hz and Site Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: UTE电网接入——230 V / 400 V、50 Hz及站点协调
requirement_topic.zht: UTE電網接入——230 V / 400 V、50 Hz及站點協調

summary.en: Uruguay's low-voltage public supply is commonly treated as 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, with electricity service and network connection coordinated through UTE, the national utility. EV charging installations must be reviewed as electrical loads, including service capacity, metering, protection, earthing, load management, commissioning, and site documentation. Uruguay's 50 Hz frequency is closer to China than many Americas markets, but 230 V / 400 V ratings, local protective-device selection, and UTE site requirements still need project-level confirmation.
summary.zh: 乌拉圭低压公共供电通常按230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz处理，并通过国家电力公司UTE协调供电服务和电网接入。电动汽车充电设施须作为电气负荷审查，包括供电容量、计量、保护、接地、负载管理、调试和站点文件。乌拉圭50 Hz频率比许多美洲市场更接近中国，但230 V / 400 V额定值、当地保护器件选择和UTE站点要求仍须按项目确认。
summary.zht: 烏拉圭低壓公共供電通常按230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz處理，並通過國家電力公司UTE協調供電服務和電網接入。電動汽車充電設施須作為電氣負荷審查，包括供電容量、計量、保護、接地、負載管理、調試和站點文件。烏拉圭50 Hz頻率比許多美洲市場更接近中國，但230 V / 400 V額定值、當地保護器件選擇和UTE站點要求仍須按項目確認。

standards_or_laws: UTE electricity service and grid-connection requirements
UNIT standards and conformity practice for electrical installations
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Uruguay's 230 V / 400 V, 50 Hz grid is frequency-compatible but not a substitute for confirming voltage range, three-phase ratings, protection coordination, metering, and UTE installation acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。乌拉圭230 V / 400 V、50 Hz电网在频率上兼容，但仍不能替代对电压范围、三相额定值、保护配合、计量和UTE安装验收的确认。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。烏拉圭230 V / 400 V、50 Hz電網在頻率上兼容，但仍不能替代對電壓範圍、三相額定值、保護配合、計量和UTE安裝驗收的確認。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) charger input ratings cover 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) the installation design covers UTE service capacity, metering, earthing, protection, and commissioning; (3) harmonic, leakage-current, EMC, and load-management evidence is available for the intended site; (4) public-network chargers meet any UTE charging-network or tender requirements. A China domestic 220 V / 380 V design without a Uruguay-specific grid review is not installation-ready.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入额定值覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 安装设计覆盖UTE供电容量、计量、接地、保护和调试；(3) 具备面向目标站点的谐波、漏电流、EMC和负载管理证据；(4) 公共网络充电桩满足UTE充电网络或招标要求。未完成乌拉圭电网审查的中国国内220 V / 380 V设计不具备安装就绪状态。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入額定值覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 安裝設計覆蓋UTE供電容量、計量、接地、保護和調試；(3) 具備面向目標站點的諧波、漏電流、EMC和負載管理證據；(4) 公共網絡充電樁滿足UTE充電網絡或招標要求。未完成烏拉圭電網審查的中國國內220 V / 380 V設計不具備安裝就緒狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected installations — UTE service capacity, metering, protection, and site acceptance must be coordinated for the specific location; confirm the current UTE process before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a UTE approval substitute; voltage, protection, and metering documentation must be re-confirmed for Uruguay

source.publisher: UTE — Administración Nacional de Usinas y Trasmisiones Eléctricas

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uruguay's 50 Hz grid reduces frequency risk, but it does not remove the need for a UTE-facing grid package covering 230 V / 400 V ratings, metering, protection, EMC, and commissioning. China domestic grid acceptance is not transferable.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌拉圭50 Hz电网降低了频率风险，但并不免除面向UTE准备230 V / 400 V额定值、计量、保护、EMC和调试资料包的需要。中国国内并网验收不能转移适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏拉圭50 Hz電網降低了頻率風險，但並不免除面向UTE準備230 V / 400 V額定值、計量、保護、EMC和調試資料包的需要。中國國內併網驗收不能轉移適用。
